title: magnolia officinalis subsp. biloba
intro: Magnolia officinalis subsp. biloba, also known as Houpu Magnolia or Magnolia biloba, is a plant species that belongs to the Magnoliaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Magnolia officinalis subsp. biloba include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
